name: RadioGroup
title: 单选框组
description: Bootstrap彩色单选框组件，数据源渲染单选选项，仅支持单一选中值，支持多主题色、行内/垂直布局、全局禁用
author: LiuHan

properties.name: dataSource
properties.description: 选项数据源数组，每项包含label展示文本、value绑定值
properties.label: 选项数据源

properties.name: value
properties.description: 当前选中单项的值，单选仅存单个值，onChange双向绑定
properties.label: 选中值

properties.name: inline
properties.description: true横向并排，false垂直分行排列
properties.label: 行内横向布局

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: 全局禁用全部单选框，不可切换选择
properties.label: 全局禁用

events.name: onChange
events.description: 切换选中项触发，回调参数为当前选中单项value值
events.label: 选中变更
